output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel WHERE {
  ?player p:P1351 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1351 ?goals ; pq:P3450 wd:Q103821894 .
  ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?goals) > 0)
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?goals))
LIMIT 1
output.selections:
Using entities:
- 2021 Major League Soccer season (wd:Q103821894), also known as "MLS 2021":
  - 26th season of Major League Soccer
  - is instance of sports season

Using properties:
- number of points/goals/set scored (wd:P1351 as p/ps), also known as "GF", "goals for", "goals scored", "number of goals", "number of points", etc.:
  - goals / points scored in a match or an event used as qualifier to the participant. Use P1358 for league points.
- sports season of league or competition (wd:P3450 as pq), also known as "athletics meeting item belonging to this instance", "edition of annual athletics meeting", "is an edition of athletics meeting", "is a season of", "is season of", etc.:
  - property that shows the competition of which the item is a season. Use P5138 for "season of club or team".

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel WHERE {
  ?player p:P1351 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1351 ?goals ; pq:P3450 wd:Q103821894 .
  ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?goals) > 0)
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?goals))
LIMIT 1
```
